creator: jaj@hcl-club.lu
text:
On Thu, 24 Jan 2008 04:40:06 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of multimedia/handbrake,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/119937 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119937
> 

Hi and thanks for your patch!
I submitted a similar patch not long ago:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=119908
Could you perhaps test it and tell me if it works for you?

Concerning your patch:
Are you sure --enable-shared is needed for a52dec? handbrake shouldn't
make use of shared libs.

jam -j doesn't seem to do what you intend. From the doc:

-j n : Run up to n shell commands concurrently (UNIX and NT only). The
default is 1.

I usually also specify -DPIC when I specify -fPIC but I don't think it
changes anything in this case.

Best regards,
Jona
